entities.name: Knowledge Write Protection
entities.context: Principle preventing automatic updates to knowledge base; requires staged approval

entities.name: Human-in-the-loop
entities.context: Required approval mechanism for decisions and resolutions before knowledge changes

entities.name: Proactive Engagement Boundaries
entities.context: Principle limiting automated engagement to weekly, weekend timing, always optional

relationships.context: Write protection enforced through human-in-the-loop approval requirement
Both are safety principles governing V's knowledge system automation
